title: DLSA Begusarai – Para Legal Volunteer
shortInfo: District Legal Services Authority, Begusarai (DLSA Begusarai) Recruitment 2026 for post of Para Legal Volunteer. Candidates with 10th Pass Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through DLSA Begusarai official website.

basic_details.job_title: DLSA Begusarai Para Legal Volunteer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority, Begusarai (DLSA Begusarai) Recruitment 2026 for post of Para Legal Volunteer. Candidates with 10th Pass Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through DLSA Begusarai official website.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 750/- per day (only on assigned special days)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Begusarai Para Legal Volunteer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
